title: Advanced Pod Configuration — Pod affinity and anti-affinity
text:
In addition to node affinity, you can also constrain which nodes a Pod can be scheduled on based on the labels of
other Pods
that are already running on nodes. Pod affinity allows you to specify rules about where a Pod should be placed relative to other Pods.
